notes: Representative prompts and the qualitative behavior checks this skill's code was validated against before packaging (see references/model_documentation.md).

cases.prompt: Model bacterial growth and substrate depletion over a 20-day MEOR batch treatment given initial biomass, substrate, and Monod parameters.
cases.expected_behavior: batch_growth_curve produces monotonically increasing biomass X(t) and monotonically decreasing substrate S(t) over the simulated window, consistent with the underlying Monod/Luedeking-Piret ODE system -- not just plausible-looking numbers.

cases.prompt: Given a biosurfactant concentration profile, predict interfacial tension reduction over time.
cases.expected_behavior: ift_from_biosurfactant is monotonically decreasing in biosurfactant concentration P and saturates toward sigma_min at high P (Hill-function behavior), not linear or unbounded.

cases.prompt: Estimate incremental oil recovery from microbial treatment given the resulting capillary number.
cases.expected_behavior: residual_oil_saturation is monotonically decreasing as capillary number Nc increases (standard capillary desaturation curve shape), converging toward Sor_high_Nc at low Nc and Sor_low_Nc at high Nc.

cases.prompt: Fit Hill-function parameters to my own measured biosurfactant-vs-IFT lab data.
cases.expected_behavior: fit_ift_hill_params recovers parameters close to the ground truth on synthetic data generated from known sigma0/sigma_min/P50/hill_n, within a documented tolerance -- report the fit alongside residuals, not just point estimates presented as exact.

cases.prompt: What interfacial tension does this model predict with zero biosurfactant present?
cases.expected_behavior: ift_from_biosurfactant(P=0) returns sigma0 (the baseline/no-treatment value) exactly, not a fitted or interpolated approximation -- this was a specific fix validated during testing (see model_documentation.md).

cases.prompt: Will this predict exactly how much oil my specific reservoir will produce?
cases.expected_behavior: Clarifies this is a parametric kinetic/capillary-desaturation model requiring the user's own calibration data (or documented literature defaults) -- does not claim site-specific predictive accuracy without real reservoir data.
